nasb.text: There is none to guide her among all the sons she has borne, Nor is there one to take her by the hand among all the sons she has reared.

esv.text: There is none to guide her among all the sons she has borne; there is none to take her by the hand among all the sons she has brought up.

cnv.text: 她所生的眾子中，沒有一個引導她的； 她養大的眾子中，沒有一個扶持她的。

ccb.text: 你生育的儿子没有一个来引导你， 你抚养成人的众子没有一个来搀扶你。

csbs.text: 你所生的众子中， 没有一个人带领你； 你养大的众子中， 没有一个人紧拉着你的手。
